title: Kabray

'''Kabray''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] forest [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Kabray Station]], a neutral meeting place for diplomats from all over [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="MC77" />

It was on [[Kabray Station]] that [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] impersonated [[Shirley]], the [[Chanteuse of the Stars/Legends|Chanteuse of the Stars]], while searching for [[Tay Vanis]].<ref name="MC77" /> Leia later went to Kabray to reassure representatives of the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] that the Alliance would not be merely a new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], but she and the delegates were captured by [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]]. Leia's [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] aides helped free Leia and defeat the Nagai.<ref name="MC95" />

{{Planet-stub}}
